# FilePro

> FilePro is a free online file converter and compressor. Convert PDF to Word, Word to PDF, JPG to PNG, PNG to JPG, and MP4 to MP3. Compress PDF, images (JPG/PNG), and video (MP4) files. No signup or registration required. Files are automatically deleted after 1 hour.

## What FilePro Does

FilePro is a web-based file processing tool. Users upload a file, select a conversion or compression option, and download the result. The entire process takes seconds. No account creation, email address, or software installation is required.

## Supported Operations

### File Conversion
- PDF to Word (.docx) — https://filepro.neobize.com/pdf-to-word
- Word (.docx) to PDF — https://filepro.neobize.com/word-to-pdf
- JPG/JPEG to PNG — https://filepro.neobize.com/jpg-to-png
- PNG to JPG — https://filepro.neobize.com/png-to-jpg
- MP4 to MP3 — https://filepro.neobize.com/mp4-to-mp3

### File Compression
- Compress PDF — https://filepro.neobize.com/compress-pdf
- Compress Images (JPG, PNG) — https://filepro.neobize.com/compress-image
- Compress Video (MP4) — https://filepro.neobize.com/compress
- All compression — https://filepro.neobize.com/compress

## Pricing

FilePro has a free tier (no signup) and a paid Premium plan.

- **Free**: $0/month. File size limit: 20MB. 1 file at a time. All formats supported. Files deleted after 1 hour. No ads: No. API access: No.
- **Premium**: $9.99/month. File size limit: 500MB. Unlimited conversions. Batch uploads. No ads. Priority processing. API access.

See full pricing: https://filepro.neobize.com/pricing
Machine-readable pricing: https://filepro.neobize.com/pricing.md

## Privacy & Security

- All file transfers use SSL/TLS encryption
- Uploaded files are stored temporarily and auto-deleted after 1 hour
- FilePro does not store, analyze, or share user files
- No account required — users are anonymous

## Technical Stack

- Frontend: Next.js 14 (Pages Router), TailwindCSS
- Backend: Node.js/Express with Bull queue (Redis-backed async processing)
- PDF processing: LibreOffice (conversions), Ghostscript (compression)
- Image processing: Sharp (libvips-based)
- Video/audio processing: FFmpeg
- Infrastructure: Docker + Dokploy (Traefik reverse proxy)

## Alternatives

FilePro is a free alternative to:
- Smallpdf (compress-pdf.com)
- ILovePDF (ilovepdf.com)
- Adobe Acrobat online tools
- CloudConvert

## Contact

- Website: https://filepro.neobize.com
- Support: contactneobize@gmail.com
